title: Katherinea prasina
intro: Katherinea prasina, also known as green Katherinea, is a perennial plant species in the family Pedaliaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The bioactive constituents of Katherinea prasina include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Katherinea prasina is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it may also be used to make topical creams and ointments to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
taxonomy: Katherinea prasina is a genus of flowering plants in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is a monotypic genus, meaning that it contains only one species, Katherinea prasina.
